first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. The score is unchanged (6/10), and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are all rephrasings of the same core points: strong full-stack and geospatial experience, but lacking direct commercial C++ or Rust experience for routing. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any judgment based on the location change from Berlin to Bucharest.
